seoTitle: Springwood vs St Andrews — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Springwood and St Andrews. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Springwood vs St Andrews: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Springwood and St Andrews.
heading: Springwood vs St Andrews — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Springwood, New South Wales and St Andrews, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Andrews has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Springwood (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Springwood or St Andrews safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Springwood has a flood risk score of 59/100, while St Andrews scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Springwood scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. St Andrews scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Springwood or St Andrews?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Andrews has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
